D:\Software\gcc-arm-none-eabi\bin\arm-none-eabi-gcc.exe -g -mfloat-abi=hard -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mcpu=cortex-m4 -mthumb -mthumb-interwork -Wl,--gc-sections -flto -specs=nano.specs -specs=nosys.specs -u_printf_float -u_scanf_float -Wl,--print-memory-usage,-Map=D:/Company/HC32F4A0Core/hc32f4a0-bootloader/build/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.map,--cref -T D:/Company/HC32F4A0Core/hc32f4a0-bootloader/drivers/hc32f4a0-drivers/linker/bootloader/HC32F4A0xI.ld CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/fatfs/src/diskio.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/fatfs/src/ff.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/fatfs/src/ffsystem.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/fatfs/src/ffunicode.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/hardware/src/mygpio.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/hardware/src/mysys.c.obj CMakeFiles/hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf.dir/src/main.c.obj -o hc32f4a0ritb_bootloader.elf  drivers\hc32f4a0-drivers\libhc32f4a0.a
